features: Our cooling jelly eye masks are infused with a cocktail of skin hero's like Glycerin & Red Seaweed.
Collagen & Lavender Extract helps reduce the appearance of fine lines and tighten the skin below the eyes.
Lock in that much needed hydration for that instant plump effect.
Top Tip - Pop in your fridge for an even more dreamy dewy treatment!
description: Product Description These under-eye gel patches are infused with a cocktail of skin hero's like Glycerin & Red Seaweed to lock in that much needed hydration for that instant plump effect. Whilst the Collagen & Lavender extract helps reduce the appearance of fine lines and tighten the skin below the eyes. Ingredients Liquid: Aqua, Glycerin, Paraffinum Liquidum, Dimethicone, Cetearyl Alcohol, Isopropyl Palmitate, Sorbitan Stearate, Propylene Glycol, Phenoxyethanol, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Extract. Gel Patch: Aqua, Glycerin, Chondrus Crispus Extract, Xanthan Gum, Hydrolyzed Sclerotium Gum, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Phenoxyethanol, CI 77019, CI 77491, CI 77891. Safety Warning For external use only See more
